untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern formation cannot be mechanically detected from OHLCV data alone. Throwback/pullback avoidance logic, overhead resistance/underlying support detection, and congestion identification require pattern recognition beyond the allowed indicator set. Breakout gap confirmation requires intraday or multi-timeframe analysis. Entry/exit conditions are qualitative pattern observations rather than quantifiable technical indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the core intent: (1) volume spike on breakout confirmation, (2) gap-like price movement confirmation using prev_high/prev_low, (3) context-dependent direction based on bear market 69% success rate vs unknown bull rate, (4) exit around pivot support/resistance as proxy for throwback target. However, the core diamond pattern detection and resistance/support/congestion avoidance logic cannot be reliably expressed with only price/volume/MA/RSI/ATR/Bollinger/MACD/ADX/Stochastic/Donchian/Pivot indicators. This rule requires pattern shape analysis and multi-level support/resistance detection.
